title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Aramex India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Aramex India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!
